betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6CMB Steel§f (Cosmic Microwave Background Steel) is an exotic alloy with unique properties.

§eObtaining:§f
• Requires §bPoisonous Mud§f from Watz reactor
• Complex alloying process

§eUses:§f
• Most advanced technology
• End-game equipment
• Ultimate material tier components

§eWatz Connection:§f
This is the primary reason to build a §bWatz Powerplant§f - for Poisonous Mud production.

§aTip:§f Represents the peak of materials science - essential for ultimate end-game.
